_description: Elegant light-background pull-quote card with large SVG quotation marks, italic serif quote text, and author attribution. Best for memorable quotes of 1–3 sentences. Customize background, text, and accent colors per slide for variety.

_slots.quote: REQUIRED — the quote text, without any quotation marks (they are drawn as SVG)
_slots.author: optional — the person who said it
_slots.role: optional — their title, context, or the source work (e.g. 'CEO', 'Meditations, 180 AD')
_slots.image: optional — author portrait. Path or https:// URL. Displayed as a circle (140px) beside the author name. Square or portrait-oriented photos work best.
_slots.bg: optional — hex background color (default: #faf7f2, a warm off-white)
_slots.ink: optional — hex color for all text (default: #1a1714, near-black)
_slots.accent: optional — hex color for the quotation marks, rule, and topic tag (default: #c0392b)

title: Words That Moved the World

slides.quote: Every child is an artist. The problem is how to remain an artist once we grow up.
slides.author: Pablo Picasso

slides.quote: The two most powerful warriors are patience and time.
slides.author: Leo Tolstoy

slides.quote: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
slides.author: Steve Jobs

slides.quote: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
slides.author: Marcus Aurelius
